issues.message: Plural flag name '--sinks' for repeatable flag (should be singular '--sink')
Listing commands 'sinks' and 'schedules' output JSON formatting by default instead of a tabular structure
Table column headers printed by 'todo list' are not rendered in bold
Table column headers cannot be hidden via '--no-headers' flag

issues.category: CLI Copy and Tone of Voice
issues.message: Daemon status and stop commands use 'failed' error messages instead of 'cannot'
